title: Headset connection status change reflected on the Cloud
scenario: Headset connection status (green/red indicator) is not correctly reflected across Cloud pages (Device Users, Mobile user, Inventory, Mobile profile, Device profile) when headset is powered on/off
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure the headset is powered ON and connected to the mobile device via Bluetooth.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and verify the headset connection status is displayed as connected (green indicator).
4. Log in to the Cloud portal and navigate to the Device Users page. Verify the headset shows a green status mark.
5. Navigate to the Mobile user page on the Cloud portal. Verify the headset shows a green status mark.
6. Navigate to the Inventory page on the Cloud portal. Verify the headset shows a green status mark.
7. Navigate to the Mobile profile page on the Cloud portal. Verify the headset shows a green status mark.
8. Navigate to the Device profile page on the Cloud portal. Verify the headset shows a green status mark.
9. Power OFF the headset by pressing and holding the Power button.

10. Return to the Cloud portal and refresh each page: Device Users page, Mobile user page, Inventory page, Mobile profile page, and Device profile page. Verify the headset shows a red status mark on all pages.
expected: When the headset is turned ON, a green status mark appears on all Cloud pages (Device Users, Mobile user, Inventory, Mobile profile, Device profile). When the headset is turned OFF, a red status mark appears on all Cloud pages.
